'''San-pilots''' were small fish which lived in parasitical symbiosis on the skin of [[Sando aqua monster/Legends|sando aqua monsters]].<ref name="WSWFG" />

==Behind the scenes==
San-pilots first appeared in the [[2001]] reference book ''[[The Wildlife of Star Wars: A Field Guide]]'' by [[Terryl Whitlatch]] and [[Bob Carrau]].<ref name="WSWFG" />

*<!-- 2001-11-XX -->''[[The Wildlife of Star Wars: A Field Guide]]'' {{1stm}}
